name: dependency-updater-ai
description: Check and update package dependencies for Python, Node.js, and Rust projects. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: check_outdated
tools.description: Parse a dependency manifest (requirements.txt, package.json) and identify outdated packages.

tools.name: suggest_updates
tools.description: Suggest dependency updates with a chosen strategy: patch (safest), minor, or major (latest).

tools.name: check_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Check a comma-separated list of 'package==version' for known vulnerabilities.

tools.name: generate_lockfile
tools.description: Generate a deterministic lockfile-style output with pinned versions and integrity hashes.
